ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location data */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location data was recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location data was recorded */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed at the location */,
  "bearing" REAL /* Bearing at the location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, car) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vehicle (e.g., volume, weight) */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the vehicle (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., shipment, equipment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the asset */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the asset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the asset */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the asset */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_locations" (
  "vehicle_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle location */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location data */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken by the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_locations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_locations" (
  "asset_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset location */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location data */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken by the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_locations_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the driver (in years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispatchers" (
  "dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispatcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dispatcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dispatcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the dispatcher */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team that the dispatcher belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispatcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., superuser, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles_drivers" (
  "vehicle_driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-driver relationship */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drivers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drivers_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets_dispatchers" (
  "asset_dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset-dispatcher relationship */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dispatcher */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_dispatcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_dispatchers_dispatcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("dispatcher_id") REFERENCES dispatchers ("dispatcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_dispatchers_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_locations_history" (
  "vehicle_location_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle location history */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location data */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken by the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_location_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_locations_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_locations_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_locations_history" (
  "asset_location_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset location history */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location data */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken by the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_location_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_locations_history_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_locations_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., route deviation, asset malfunction) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle (if applicable) */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "vehicle_maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_maintenance" (
  "asset_maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset maintenance record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., inspection, repair) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_maintenance_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
